info.title: Smart Spatial System API
info.description: MVP API for natural geospatial query execution.

schema.title: Response Get Project Projects  Project Id  Get
Response List Project Data Sources Projects  Project Id  Data Sources Get

post.description:
Upload a raster file.

MVP:
    - JSON raster files can be used directly through raster_ref.
    - GeoTIFF files are stored for future rasterio/local_raster_loader integration.

schema.title: Response Upload Raster Uploads Raster Post

post.description:
Upload a vector file.

MVP:
    - GeoJSON/JSON can be used directly.
    - GPKG/SHP ZIP/KML are stored and should be resolved by local_vector_loader.

schema.title: Response Upload Vector Uploads Vector Post
Response Get Upload Metadata Uploads  Upload Id  Get
Response Get Data Source Data Sources  Upload Id  Get
Response Delete Data Source Data Sources  Upload Id  Delete
Response Update Data Source Data Sources  Upload Id  Patch
Response Preview Data Source Data Sources  Upload Id  Preview Get
Response Register Csv Table Source Data Sources Csv Table Post
Response Register Wms Source Data Sources Wms Post

post.description:
Connect to PostGIS, fetch a spatial table and register as a data source.

Expected body:
    {
        "project_id": "optional",
        "display_name": "optional",
        "table": "roads",
        "schema": "public",
        "geom_col": "geom",
        "where": "optional SQL filter",
        "limit": 1000,
        "output_srid": 4326,
        "dsn": "postgresql://user:pass@host/db",
        "host": "localhost",
        "port": 5432,
        "database": "gis",
        "user": "postgres",
        "password": "secret",
        "profile": "optional config profile"
    }

schema.title: Response Register Postgis Source Data Sources Postgis Post

post.description:
Fetch features from WFS service and register as a data source.

Expected body:
    {
        "project_id": "optional",
        "display_name": "optional",
        "base_url": "https://...",
        "type_name": "layer:name",
        "layer": "alias from config",
        "service": "config profile name",
        "version": "2.0.0",
        "output_format": "application/json",
        "srs_name": "EPSG:4326",
        "bbox": [minx, miny, maxx, maxy],
        "max_features": 1000,
        "timeout": 30
    }

schema.title: Response Register Wfs Source Data Sources Wfs Post
Response Register Url Source Data Sources Url Post

This endpoint intentionally never returns secrets/API keys.

get.description: Return Leaflet-ready map layers for a previous request.

get.description: List persisted output files for a request.

schema.title: Response List Request Output Files Requests  Request Id  Outputs Files Get

get.description:
Download a generated document for a request.

Security policy:
- serves files from the configured reports runtime directory
- blocks path traversal
- requires the filename to be associated with the same request_id

schema.title: Response Save Weights Weights Save Post
Response Reload Weights Weights Reload Post
Response Apply Weight Proposal Weights Proposals Apply Post

post.description:
Plan natural geospatial query intent using LLM.

Does not execute plugins.

schema.title: Response Plan Intent Planner Intent Post

post.description:
Execute natural geospatial query.

Expected body:
    {
        "query": "...",
        "inputs": {...},
        "band_map": {...},
        "request_id": "optional",
        "user_context": {...},
        "metadata": {...},
        "min_score": 0.01
    }

Submit user feedback for a previous request.

Expected body:
    {
        "request_id": "...",
        "rating": "correct|incorrect|partial",
        "issue_types": ["route_error"],
        "expected_capability": "threshold_raster",
        "expected_plugin_id": "raster_threshold",
        "comment": "...",
        "user_context": {...}
    }

schema.title: Response Feedback Endpoint Api V1 Feedback Post

OutputBucketsResponse.title: OutputBucketsResponse
OutputBucketsResponse.description:
Normalized frontend-facing output buckets.

Additional keys are allowed so new output types can be added without
breaking older UI clients.

OutputManifestResponse.title: OutputManifestResponse
OutputManifestResponse.description:
Persisted output manifest contract used by the frontend.

`files` is the physical persisted-file manifest.
`outputs`/`output_buckets` are the normalized logical output buckets.

query.title: Query
examples: یک تحلیل ساده تستی انجام بده

inputs.title: Inputs
inputs.description: Input datasets and references keyed by logical name.

band_map.title: Band Map
band_map.description: Optional raster band mapping, for example {'red': 3, 'nir': 4}.

QueryRequest.title: QueryRequest
QueryRequest.description:
Frontend-facing natural geospatial query request.

`inputs` defaults to an empty object so the UI can start with a plain
natural-language query and attach datasets later when needed.

status.title: Status
status.description: Execution status, e.g. completed or failed.

QueryResponse.title: QueryResponse
QueryResponse.description:
Stable frontend-facing query response contract.

The backend may include additional diagnostic fields. The fields below are
the stable surface the UI can rely on.

RequestRecordResponse.title: RequestRecordResponse
RequestRecordResponse.description:
Frontend-facing request record.

The request store may include additional service/audit fields; they remain
available through extra properties.
